config.description: Intervention-first sprint testing whether the model can be causally shifted from a stall/bridge token toward direct Paris commitment on an ambiguous France association prompt.

prompts.text: The city people most strongly associate with France is
The city most people associate with France is
The famous city in France is
The city people most strongly associate with Italy is
The city people most strongly associate with the United Kingdom is
The city people most strongly associate with this phrase is
The thing people most strongly associate with this word is

intervention_prompt.text: The city people most strongly associate with France is
